data.title: Trump Admin's Crypto Push Revives Industry Hopes For Banking Access
data.description: Cryptocurrency sector seeks reset with banks after strained relations and regulatory crackdowns. Trump's election brings hope but banking challenges persist. Congress probes restricted access.

Bank Of America Raises Bullish Outlook On US Brokers, Exchanges, Alternative Investments: 3 Top Picks For 2025
data.description: Bank of America bullish on U.S. brokers, asset managers and exchanges for 2025. Red wave in 2024 to open doors for crypto and alts. Blue Owl, IBKR and TW top picks; HOOD and SCHW underperformers.
